name: design-review
description: Unified design orchestrator (v2.1): groups ALL design skills, routes each to its correct command/mode, accumulates suggestions, asks user (multi-select), applies chosen fixes via owning fix command. Vitality telos: bootstrap → audit-first → reference-research (+ui-ux-pro-max vocabulary) → 4 core skills REALLY ROUTED → vitality-verdict (alive/templated/flat) → loop. Agents + /design-review command + PostToolUse gate hook.
